expectation_update: v0 completed in one active session, so the previous one-year v0-v2 timeline is too conservative and must be recalibrated from logged progress
notes: Minutes are active-work estimate reconstructed from the session; future entries should be logged at session end.
task: Initial scaffold, live source samples, seed graph, public GitHub publish

expectation_update: Use observed artifact-per-hour rate to revise v1 and v2 estimates after each material chunk.
scope_adjustment: Project management is now repository state, not chat state; future scope changes must be recorded in the ledger.
task: Add durable work folder, time ledger, scope calibration, and progress report tooling

expectation_update: V1 completed much faster than the earlier days-to-weeks estimate because paginated M-CSA and UniProt TSV APIs were straightforward.
scope_adjustment: V1 criteria are satisfied by a bounded 50-entry graph slice; broader scale is now an expansion problem, not a schema blocker.
task: Build persistent catalytic graph with M-CSA pages, Rhea EC mapping, UniProt links, and structure cross-references

expectation_update: The completed V2 is a scaffold-level research artifact, not the final high-impact enzyme atlas; time estimates must distinguish scaffold completion from scientific validation.
scope_adjustment: V2 scaffold criteria are satisfied; next work should increase scientific quality rather than add more dashboard-like surface area.
task: Build first V2 benchmark, baseline retrieval, inconsistency detector, dark hydrolase mining campaign, dossiers, and report

expectation_update: Geometry extraction was implementable quickly for PDB-linked M-CSA entries; the harder next step is label quality and retrieval evaluation.
scope_adjustment: Post-V2 quality work now targets geometry-aware retrieval rather than more text-only scaffolding.
task: Add geometry-aware active-site feature extraction from PDB mmCIF files

expectation_update: Next quality bottleneck is curated mechanism labels and evaluation, not baseline implementation.
scope_adjustment: Geometry now affects retrieval scores through residue signature matching and catalytic-cluster compactness.
task: Add geometry-aware seed fingerprint retrieval baseline

expectation_update: The next bottleneck is improving ranking and abstention, not adding labels machinery.
scope_adjustment: Curated labels are now explicit for the 20-entry geometry slice; retrieval quality is measurable and currently weak at top1.
task: Add curated seed mechanism labels and geometry retrieval evaluation
